ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: Gammon Joint with added water (89%) [Pork (88%), Water, Salt, Antioxidant (Sodium Ascorbate), Preservative (Sodium Nitrite)], Honey and Maple Syrup Glaze Sachet (11%) [Water, Honey, Maple Syrup, Brown Sugar, Cornflour, Lemon Juice from concentrate, Cinnamon].
product_name: Simply Cook Honey & Maple Gammon Joint
